videos.headline: Trevor Etienne turns on the jets for 62-yard Florida TD
videos.description: Florida RB Trevor Etienne takes off for a 62-yard touchdown to tie the score with Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trevor Etienne turns on the jets for 62-yard Florida TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ramel Keyton hits the 'night night' celebration after Vols TD
videos.description: Tennessee WR Ramel Keyton makes a leaping grab in the end zone for a touchdown and uses the "night night" celebration afterwards.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ramel Keyton hits the 'night night' celebration after Vols TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kahleil Jackson makes tightrope catch for Florida first down
videos.description: FLorida QB Graham Mertz passes to Kahleil Jackson, who makes a leaning grab while keeping his feet inbounds.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kahleil Jackson makes tightrope catch for Florida first down) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Montrell Johnson Jr. cuts back for a Florida TD
videos.description: Florida RB Montrell Johnson Jr. makes a nice cut en route to a short touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Montrell Johnson Jr. cuts back for a Florida TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vols' Milton throws wild interception while getting hit
videos.description: Tennessee QB Joe Milton III gets hit as he throws and is easily picked off by Florida's Eddie Battle.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vols' Milton throws wild interception while getting hit) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Graham Mertz calls his own number for Florida TD
videos.description: Florida QB Graham Mertz keeps the ball himself and pushes the pile across the goal line for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Graham Mertz calls his own number for Florida TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mertz dumps it off to Johnson for another Florida TD
videos.description: Florida QB Graham Mertz dumps it off to Montrell Johnson Jr., who goes 18 yards to the house for another Gators score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mertz dumps it off to Johnson for another Florida TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida's defense stuffs Tennessee on 4th down
videos.description: Tennessee RB Jaylen Wright gets tackled for a loss on 4th-and-1 as Florida takes over on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida's defense stuffs Tennessee on 4th down) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vols still alive after Joe Milton III's 55-yard TD dime
videos.description: Tennessee QB Joe Milton III airs it out to Bru McCoy for a 60-yard touchdown in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vols still alive after Joe Milton III's 55-yard TD dime) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida's defense gets a clutch 4th-down stop
videos.description: The Florida Gators defense steps up again by forcing Joe Milton III to throw an incomplete pass on 4th down late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida's defense gets a clutch 4th-down stop) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Frustrations boil over as Tennessee-Florida game ends in a scuffle
videos.description: As the game ends, multiple players from Tennessee and Florida get into a heated exchange, and punches are thrown.
